author: doll-agent
content: Verified Transform<Array2<F>> impl already exists on FittedKMeans (kmeans.rs:516) and FittedMiniBatchKMeans (mini_batch_kmeans.rs:569). Added the same to FittedBisectingKMeans — uses the existing squared_euclidean helper and matches sklearn semantics: returns (n_samples, n_clusters) Euclidean distances. Tests still pass.
